tooltip.resize: Scale and position design on target canvas (e.g. 4500x5400 for MBA)
tooltip.distress: Add vintage grain, scratches, and edge wear
tooltip.watermark: Add text watermark with position and tiling
tooltip.defringe: Remove color halos at design edges
tooltip.shrink: Erode N pixels from visible design edges
tooltip.colorDefringe: Replace edge fringe with nearest design color

colorRemovalParams.contiguousHint: Only remove connected regions from edges
colorRemovalParams.fillHolesHint: Repair small gaps inside design elements
colorRemovalParams.deepCleanHint: Multi-pass: also remove trapped BG between design elements

speckleRemoverParams.minSizeHint: Pixel groups smaller than this are removed

transparencyCleanerParams.thresholdHint: Pixels with alpha below this become fully transparent

defringeParams.autoDetected: Value is auto-calculated based on edge analysis

shrinkParams.amountHint: Number of edge pixels to remove per iteration

colorDefringeParams.edgeWidthHint: How many pixels from the edge to process
colorDefringeParams.colorToleranceHint: How aggressively to replace edge colors (0 = none, 100 = full)

edgeCleanerParams.alphaThresholdHint: Pixels with alpha below this are considered transparent for edge detection

bgRemoveParams.serverInfo: Processed on server using AI model
bgRemoveParams.description: AI background removal for complex backgrounds. Processing takes a few seconds.

upscaleParams.autoClientHint: Image is large enough — using Pica.js (client-side, instant)

upscaleParams.thresholdInfo: Auto mode: Pica.js for images >= {{threshold}}px, AI API for smaller

magicWandParams.contiguousHint: Only select connected pixels of similar color
